data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for an audit trail of exports.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for an audit trail of who was exported and when. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations regarding this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for an audit trail but does not demonstrate its implementation or validation in the current saga run, indicating a lack of sufficient evidence to assert a definitive conclusion.
gaps: No evidence of validation for the audit trail of who was exported and when.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
